name: Cost Optimizer
description: Predictive cost tracking, budget management, and smart model routing.

dailyBudget.description: Maximum daily spend in USD (0 = unlimited)

weeklyBudget.description: Maximum weekly spend in USD (0 = unlimited)

monthlyBudget.description: Maximum monthly spend in USD (0 = unlimited)

hardCap.description: If true, block requests when budget is exceeded. If false, warn only.

trackByAgent.description: Track costs per agent separately (default: true)

trackByModel.description: Track costs per model separately (default: true)
